message:
refactor(codegen): Replace inline type checks with trait functions (batch 3)

Refactor 22 files to use centralized trait functions instead of
inline type pattern matching. This enforces consistent type handling
across the codebase.

Files updated:
- method_calls.zig: Use string_traits.isString()
- conversions/*: Use type_traits, container_traits
- expressions.zig, lambda.zig: Use trait functions
- json.zig, functools_mod.zig, itertools_mod.zig: Module imports
- methods/dict.zig, methods/list.zig: Container trait usage
- control/conditionals.zig, loops/while.zig: Type checking
- class_fields.zig: Trait-based type inference
